case_title: MICHAEL SADLER VS. NICLOLE ALEJANDRA REYES CASTRO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-25-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-25-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-25-2015 - JUDGMENT.
